pages.raw_text:
TACOMA, AIN. 11.-By unani-
nous vote the State Federation of
Labor convention adopted a resolu-
ton condemning the ship subsidy
plan. Copies of the resolution
were ordered sent to congressman
from this state.


On motion of E. A. Cooney, of
Spokane, smoking was prohibited
in the convention. This is the first
time in the history of the organiZa-
ton that the rule has been en-
forced.


The federation will boycott the
Seattle fair unless union labor is
employed in construction work A
committee sent to interview direc-
tors will report to the convention
today.


By vote of 200 to SO the con-
vention favored enforcement Of
the Sunday theater law. By unani-
nous vote a Spokane resolution
was adopted calling for state in
spection of restaurant and hotel
kitchens.


Popular election of state labor
commission, one member to be a
woman; tariff reform, national
child labor law, state constitutional
limiting power of in
functions, woman suffrage and
prohibition of alien labor on public
work wore all endorsed nv reSOlu-
ton,
